hooks.command: input=$(cat); content=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '(.tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.content // "")'); if echo "$content" | grep -qE 'eslint-disable|eslint-enable'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"eslint-disable comments are not allowed. Fix the underlying lint issue instead."}}'; fi

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css|*.md) /Users/maya/Repositories/trip-planner/node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$f"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) /Users/maya/Repositories/trip-planner/node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix --max-warnings 0 "$f" ;; esac ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
